expectations.text: Uses event { handler { ... } } wrapper (not events) for single-shot response
expectations.evidence: Lines 12 and 18: Both use `event { handler { ... } }` - correct wrapper

expectations.text: Handler returns DatastarEvent.patchElements(...) directly (not a ZIO effect)
expectations.evidence: Lines 20-35: Handler attempts to return `name.map { ... DatastarEvent.patchElements(...) }` - ZIO-wrapped result (from req.body.asString). Event handlers must return plain DatastarEvent values. Won't compile.

expectations.text: Uses dataOn.submit attribute for form submission without page reload
Includes datastarScript in the HTML head
Reads form input (name) from request and personalizes the greeting
expectations.evidence: Lines 20-24: Reads and parses name from body; line 31: personalizes greeting

expectations.text: Serves the initial HTML page (with form visible initially, greeting hidden until submitted)
expectations.evidence: Lines 12-15: Serves initial page; greeting div is empty and hidden via CSS

notes: SAME BUG as without-skill version: ZIO-wrapping in event handler. Returns `name.map {...}` instead of direct DatastarEvent. This is the canonical error the skill prevents. Won't compile.
